# Snapshots

This directory contains session state snapshots captured by the watchdog system.

**DO NOT commit large snapshots to git.** These are auto-generated by the watchdog and stored here for local reference. The primary storage is GitHub at `andrebrassfield/hermes-watchdog/snapshots/`.

## File Format

`snapshots/{session_id}_{timestamp}.json`

## Contents

```json
{
  "id": "session_xxx_timestamp",
  "reason": "context_critical | tool_stall | manual | ...",
  "ts": "ISO timestamp",
  "context_percent": 85,
  "context_history": [...],
  "tool_timing": [...],
  "health": {...}
}
```

## Cleanup

Snapshots older than 72 hours are automatically pruned by GitHub Actions.

To manually clean up:
```bash
find snapshots/ -name "*.json" -mtime +3 -delete
```
